narrative:
Nelsonville 2 (precinct in Athens County) has 403 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.4 percentage points.
